title: Smoky Lamb Kebabs
description: Grilled lamb kebabs with a smoky, mediterranean flavor, perfect for a summer evening.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Make sure the lamb is at room temperature before grilling

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat (400°F/200°C).
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, Mediterranean seasoning, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Brush the mixture evenly onto both sides of the lamb cubes.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C) for medium-rare.
Remove the kebabs from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
